_doc: Machine-readable selector map for the Skill-6 COMMUNITY / COURSE / CHANNEL builders (F3b: code and doc cannot diverge; the builders load THIS file). Companion prose: SELECTORS-LIVE-community.md + SELECTORS-LIVE-course.md.

_status_legend.verified-shared-rail: Confirmed live for forms/surveys on the SAME leadconnectorhq rail, or captured in references/form-click-map.md (global left rail). Cited; safe to act on.
_status_legend.capture-pending: NOT yet captured live for this object. D8: NO invented CSS. A REQUIRED capture-pending anchor makes the live builder STOP-and-report until the live capture run flips it to 'locked'. Fallback-chain is the CAPTURE recipe, not a fact.

_capture_contract: Flip a target to status:'locked' ONLY by a live capture run (create a scratch object, walk it, record the real anchor + confidence, DELETE the object). See the 'capture_procedure' in each SELECTORS-LIVE-*.md.

memberships_left_rail.note: Left-rail item is StaticText (like 'Sites') — role=link often absent; getByText is the reliable primary. Cited: references/form-click-map.md global-rail capture; spec §5.

client_portal_dropdown.note: Sites → Client Portal ▾ (spec §5, SELECTORS-LIVE-form.md §2). Communities/courses surface may live under Memberships OR Client Portal — capture confirms which.

builder_save.note: Save is a role+name anchor of conf 9.5 IN THE FORM/SURVEY iframe. Whether the community/course editor is the SAME leadconnectorhq iframe is ASSUMED — capture confirms before trusting.

fallbacks: reach via Memberships left-rail → Communities/Groups tab (getByText)
communities_list.note: Exact route segment UNKNOWN. Never deep-link the builder standalone (spins forever, per funnel/survey rule) — reach via SPA router.push AFTER a Memberships nav.

fallbacks: capture GROUP_ID from location.href OR an iframe .src after Create
group_builder.note: Capture the id shape (form ids are opaque [A-Za-z0-9]{15,30}) on the first live run and pin it.

search_box.note: Search-first idempotency (F14). Forms/surveys use getByPlaceholder('Search for forms'/'Search for surveys'); the communities placeholder text is UNKNOWN — capture it.

create_group_button.note: Label UNKNOWN (forms='Create form', surveys='Add survey' — NOT symmetric). Capture the exact button name.

row_actions.note: Delete flow parity with forms/surveys (Actions → menuitem Delete → confirm dialog). Capture confirms.

fallbacks: getByRole('textbox') labeled Name in the create dialog
Public/Private radio or switch in the create dialog
privacy_toggle.note: Privacy control shape (radio vs switch vs dropdown) UNKNOWN — capture.

fallbacks: '+' next to the Channels section header (icon-only SVG path-d + order)
add_channel_control.note: The channel-add control is the LEAST-known surface. Capture both the trigger AND the channel-create modal (name field + confirm).

fallbacks: reach via Memberships left-rail → Courses/Products tab (getByText)
courses_list.note: Exact route UNKNOWN. GHL courses live in the Memberships area (spec §5). Reach via SPA router.push after a Memberships nav.

fallbacks: capture COURSE_ID from location.href OR iframe .src after Create

search_box.note: Search-first idempotency (F14). Capture the placeholder text.

fallbacks: product-type picker (ASSUMED: courses use the Memberships Products model)
product_type.note: Whether a product-type choice is even presented is ASSUMED — capture.

fallbacks: '+' in the outline tree (SVG path-d + order)
add_module.note: GHL calls a module a 'Category' in some builds — capture the real label.

fallbacks: inline title textbox on the new module row
inline title textbox on the new lesson row
CodeMirror/RTE inside the lesson panel — set via .setValue() in-frame, never key-by-key
lesson_body_editor.note: Media is NEVER browser-uploaded — a ghl_media CDN URL is inserted as a link/embed (spec §5.2 content-law).
